parameters.command:
set -e
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
echo "OPENCLAW_CHECK_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"
echo "--- SERVICES ---"
(openclaw gateway status 2>/dev/null || true)
echo "--- DOCKER ---"
docker ps --format '{{.Names}}|{{.Image}}|{{.Status}}' | sort
echo "--- OPENCLAW BINDINGS ---"
ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(18789|18791) ' || true
echo "--- RECENT ERROR LOGS ---"
docker logs --since 24h n8n-docker-caddy-n8n-1 2>/dev/null | tail -n 80 || true
